hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then echo '[hook] Running tests before commit...' && cd /Users/sergio/CoworkSandbox/springboot-agentic-template && ./gradlew test --quiet && echo '[hook] Tests passed — commit allowed.' || (echo '[hook] BLOCKED: tests failed. Fix before committing.' && exit 1); fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.java' && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '@Entity|@Table'; then echo '[hook] Entity file changed — remember to create a Flyway migration if the schema changed.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'db/migration/V[0-9]+__.*\.sql'; then echo '[hook] Migration file written — running flywayMigrate...' && cd /Users/sergio/CoworkSandbox/springboot-agentic-template && ./gradlew flywayMigrate --quiet && echo '[hook] Migration applied successfully.' || echo '[hook] WARNING: flywayMigrate failed — check the SQL.'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//;s/"$//'); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.java) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; if which palantir-java-format >/dev/null 2>&1; then palantir-java-format --replace "$FILE" && echo "[hook] Formatted $FILE"; elif [ -f ~/.local/bin/palantir-java-format.jar ]; then java -jar ~/.local/bin/palantir-java-format.jar --replace "$FILE" && echo "[hook] Formatted $FILE"; else echo '[hook] palantir-java-format not found — skipping format (install from https://github.com/palantir/palantir-java-format/releases)'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gradlew test'; then if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -qE 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL'; then echo '[hook] Tests PASSED.'; elif echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -qE 'BUILD FAILED'; then echo '[hook] Tests FAILED — do not commit.'; fi; fi
echo '[hook] Session ended. Reminder: run ./gradlew test before committing.'
